arts.ttl: Neymar closer to MLS move but Lionel Messi reunion far from certain
arts.sum: Neymar has frequently received praise from fellow Brazilian legands, with Romário recently talking him up on Charla Podcast: “Brazil only has a chance of winning the World Cup if Neymar is playing. Neymar Júnior, one of the most influential soccer players of recent times, has left an indelible mark on fans across the globe despite significant injuries throughout his career.

arts.ttl: Neymar 'in shock talks to join MLS club'... but Brazil icon won't reunite with Lionel Messi at Inter Miami
arts.sum: It appears that Brazil football icon Neymar is considering a move stateside from Saudi Pro League club Al Hilal - with three MLS clubs in the running for his signature.

arts.ttl: Sources: Fire among 3 MLS teams in Neymar talks
arts.sum: Brazil superstar and Al Hilal attacker Neymar is in preliminary talks with three MLS sides, including Chicago Fire FC, over a proposed move, sources have told ESPN.

arts.ttl: Ex-Barcelona star labels Lamine Yamal ‘a combination of Messi & Neymar’ during Real Betis clash
arts.sum: Barcelona star Lamine Yamal has on Wednesday drawn comparisons with two of the greatest attackers in the club’s history. This comes owing to his exploits in Barcelona’s meeting with Real…

arts.ttl: Chicago Fire open talks to sign Neymar from Al Hilal
arts.sum: According to an exclusive report from French media Foot Mercato, Chicago Fire have opened up talks with Neymar Jr. (32). Chicago Fire have reportedly entered into discussions with the Brazilian…

arts.ttl: Preview: Al-Hilal vs. Al Fateh - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Saudi Pro League clash between Al-Hilal and Al Fateh, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
